news.headline: Diabetes, Overlooked and Unchecked, Poses New Risks in Africa
news.summary: As deaths from diabetes start to rival those from infectious threats like malaria, a new form of the condition linked to malnutrition is surfacing in patients who can afford neither screening nor care.
